hero.title: Your euros, working for you. Always.
hero.subtitle1: Send money anywhere in seconds. Access lending protocols paying up to 4% APY on your balance. Pay with a card. From an account no bank can freeze.
hero.disclaimer: Accessing decentralized lending protocols involves risk. Past yields are not guaranteed. Defied provides a non-custodial interface to public blockchain protocols - it does not manage or invest your funds.

infrastructure.title: Built on trusted infrastructure
infrastructure.subtitle: Powered by industry-leading providers in security, compliance, and payments.

features.sectionTitle: Everything your bank does. And what it never will.
features.f1Desc: Send euros or dollars to anyone, anywhere, in seconds. No SWIFT codes. No 3–5 business day waits. No €25 wire fees. Just a wallet address and a confirmation.
features.f2Desc: Connect to the same decentralized lending protocols used by on-chain institutions worldwide. Access pools currently offering 3–5% APY on USDC and EURC - directly, with no lock-up period. Withdraw anytime.
features.f2Disclaimer: Yields are variable and depend on protocol market conditions. This is not a guaranteed return or investment product.
features.f3Desc: Swap between USDC (dollar-pegged) and EURC (euro-pegged) instantly, at transparent rates, with a simple fee. No hidden spread.
features.f5Desc: Spend your stablecoin balance anywhere Visa is accepted. Top up from your wallet in one tap. Available on Premium plan.

advantages.title: The financial system wasn't built for you. This one is.
advantages.row1Subtext: Unlike volatile cryptocurrencies, stablecoins are pegged 1:1 to real currencies - USDC to the US dollar, EURC to the euro. You get the speed and global reach of blockchain with the price stability of the currencies you already use. Send and receive 24/7, including weekends and public holidays.
advantages.row2Subtext: With a traditional bank or fintech app, your balance is a number in their database. They hold your money. They can restrict, freeze, or close your account. With Defied, your funds live in a wallet secured by cryptography - not on our servers, not in our control. Your wallet exists and remains accessible even if Defied ceases to exist.
advantages.row3Subtext: Anyone with an internet connection can participate in decentralized lending protocols - no bank account, no approval process, no minimum balance. Defied removes the technical barriers. You access protocols directly, keeping full custody of your funds throughout.

protocolsSection.title: Protocols you can access through Defied
protocolsSection.subtitle: Defied surfaces established, extensively audited protocols. We do not endorse any protocol as risk-free. Smart contract risk exists - please read our risk disclosure before depositing.

imageSection.title: Financial tools this powerful shouldn't require a bank's permission.
imageSection.body1: Banks decide when you can access your money, how much you can move, and who you can send it to - built for institutions, not people. Defied gives every individual direct access to a transparent, secure financial system: send money globally, earn on your balance, and stay in full control of your funds. No intermediaries. No permission required.

aboutCarousel.title: Simpler than a bank account. More powerful than one.
aboutCarousel.card1Desc: When you sign up with your email, a personal digital wallet is created automatically - secured by cryptography, controlled entirely by you. Defied has zero access to your funds. We cannot move them, freeze them, or recover them on your behalf. Think of it this way: we built the safe. You hold the only key.
aboutCarousel.card2Desc: Defied is a front-end interface that connects to public, permissionless smart contracts on the Base blockchain. You interact directly with those contracts - Defied simplifies the experience, but the underlying protocols exist independently of us. You can interact with them directly at any time.
aboutCarousel.card3Desc: Defied surfaces lending, staking, and liquidity protocols in one place - no technical knowledge required. Aave, Compound, Morpho, Lido and more, accessible with one click. You retain full custody throughout.
aboutCarousel.card4Desc: We cover your gas fees when you send stablecoins or interact with supported protocols. The blockchain stays invisible. The experience stays simple.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Defied is a non-custodial stablecoin wallet that lets you send, receive, and exchange USDC and EURC on the Base network. It also provides a simple interface for accessing decentralized finance protocols - including lending, staking, and liquidity provision - without requiring any technical knowledge.
faq.a2: A stablecoin is a digital currency pegged to a real-world asset - in our case, the euro (EURC) or US dollar (USDC). Unlike bitcoin or ether, their value doesn't fluctuate wildly. You can send them globally, instantly, at any time of day - including weekends. They're backed 1:1 by real currency reserves held by regulated issuers.
faq.a3: With a non-custodial wallet, you own your funds outright - not a company, not a bank. Defied partners with Privy to create a secure wallet tied to your email address. You don't need to manage a private key manually, but you always have access to it. Defied cannot access, move, or freeze your funds under any circumstances.
faq.a4: You do. Only you. Defied and Privy have no ability to access or move your funds. If you wish, you can export your private key and use your wallet entirely independently of Defied at any time.
faq.q5: Can I withdraw at any time?
faq.a5: Yes, with no waiting period imposed by Defied. If you have deposited funds into a decentralized protocol, withdrawal terms depend on that protocol - most allow instant withdrawal, though some have waiting periods. We display this information clearly before you deposit.
faq.q6: Do I need to verify my identity?
faq.a6: To send and receive stablecoins directly, no verification is required. To convert euros or dollars from your bank account into stablecoins (on-ramp) or back (off-ramp), identity verification is required by our regulated partner Bridge.xyz. This takes under two minutes and is required by EU financial regulations.
faq.a7: There are two main risk categories. First, if someone gains access to your email account, they could gain access to your wallet - we strongly recommend enabling two-factor authentication. Second, decentralized protocols carry smart contract risk - the possibility of a bug or exploit. Defied only features protocols with extensive audit histories, but we cannot guarantee against future incidents. Funds are not protected by any deposit guarantee scheme. Please read our full risk disclosure before depositing.
faq.q8: Are my funds covered by the Deposit Guarantee Fund?
faq.a8: No. Defied is a software interface for accessing decentralized protocols, not a bank or regulated financial institution. Funds held in your wallet or deposited in DeFi protocols are not covered by any national deposit guarantee scheme.
faq.a9: Defied is currently available as a web application, optimized for both desktop and mobile browsers. Native iOS and Android apps are in development.

about.heroTitle: We created the first crypto savings product in Bulgaria
about.missionDark: Defied provides non-custodial infrastructure for easy access to decentralized finance.
about.missionLight: Our mission is to make access to decentralized finance easy.
about.blueSection: Defied allows users to create an account on the platform without needing to understand what a digital wallet and private key are in the blockchain context.
about.detailP1: Defied provides decentralized smart contract infrastructure for generating yield through leading DeFi protocols. The smart contracts are non-custodial - Defied has no access to user funds stored in them.
about.detailP2: Defied offers an intuitive user interface through which users can deposit funds in the form of stablecoins into curated decentralized protocols. Defied covers transaction costs for users (gas fees).
about.detailP3: Users can easily buy crypto or stablecoins with a debit/credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or via SEPA bank transfer.
about.advantagesHeading: No technical knowledge needed. Quick crypto purchase. Curated protocols with high yield. Full control over your assets.
about.advantagesP1: You don't need to understand how digital wallets and private keys work. We offer an easy-to-use interface and registration with just an email address.
about.advantagesP2: We have no access to your funds. You are the only one who controls your wallet. All rules of interaction with DeFi protocols are encoded in smart contracts - public, verifiable, and immutable.
about.advantagesP3: We maintain a detailed knowledge base of materials, articles, and tutorials about the world of decentralized finance.

footer.disclaimer: Defied is operated by Fusion Software LLC. Defied is a non-custodial software interface providing access to public, permissionless blockchain protocols. Defied does not provide investment, financial, legal, or tax advice. Accessing decentralized finance protocols involves significant risk, including the potential loss of funds. Variable yields referenced on this site reflect current third-party protocol rates and are not guaranteed returns. Nothing on this site constitutes an offer, solicitation, or recommendation to acquire any financial product or service. Fiat on-ramp and off-ramp services are provided by Bridge.xyz. Virtual card services are provided by Gnosis Pay. Defied does not hold, manage, or have access to user funds at any time. Services may not be available in all jurisdictions.
